# `wikimem`

> Self-improving wiki IDE. Ingest anything. Query with any LLM. Three automations.

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): Self-improving wiki IDE. Ingest anything. Query with any LLM. Three automations.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): How AI agents (Claude Code, sub-agents, the nightly observer) work inside this
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): > Forged from the Energy harness formula via harness-forge. One repo = one recursively
- [QUICKSTART.md](QUICKSTART.md): WikiMem is a self-improving local-first wiki IDE. Two ways in: use it as a tool, or
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Thanks for your interest in contributing. wikimem is an open-source project and we welcome contributions of all kinds.

## Notes

- This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) so AI agents can
  discover this repo's docs without scraping. Generated from the README + key docs.
